meaning: n.变更,变化,变异,变种,[音]变奏,变调
examples: This delicious variation on an omelette is quick and easy to prepare.
Variation among humans is limited to the possible permutations of our genes.
Modern violins had a greater variation, a larger differential.
Each of these halls is a variation on the theme of Do It Yourself.
Figure 1 illustrates the variation in three-year relative return performance of four value and growth strategies.
